companyNameJapanese: 華海清科股份有限公司
description: China's #1 CMP (Chemical Mechanical Planarization) equipment manufacturer. Founded 2013 as joint venture between Tianjin government and Tsinghua University. Products: CMP equipment (core business, >50% domestic market share for 12-inch), wafer thinning/back-grinding, dicing/scribing, edge polishing, ion implantation, wet processing equipment, wafer reclaim services, and critical consumables/maintenance. Platform strategy: equipment + services. Listed on STAR Market 2022.

majorClients: CXMT (睿力集成/合肥长鑫) - CMP equipment
All major Chinese Tier 1 and Tier 2 fabs
competitors: ACCRETECH/Tokyo Seimitsu (CMP-0001) - direct CMP equipment competitor (ChaMP series)
Applied Materials - global CMP equipment leader (Reflexion/Mirra)
Beijing Shuoke/烁科精微 (CMP-0091) - CETC subsidiary CMP
_externalRelationships.notes: Market cap ~64B CNY (~1.35T JPY). Stock price ~181 CNY (Feb 2026). Domestic market share rose from 6% (2019) to 32% (2022) to >50% (2024 for 12-inch). 2025 H1 revenue: 1.95B CNY (+30.3% YoY), net profit 505M CNY (+16.8%). 2025 Q1-Q3 revenue: 3.19B CNY (+30.3%). MOST DIRECT Chinese competitor to ACCRETECH's CMP business. CMP equipment capable of 14nm logic and 128-layer 3D NAND processes. Also expanding into dicing and thinning - further overlapping with ACCRETECH product lines. Tsinghua University technology origin.

_metadata.dataSource: Investing.com, SSE, company website, Sina Finance, Hexun, industry reports, Chinese language sources
